title: DIA
subtitle: Multi-source oracle token prices
description: Free x402 passthrough for DIA real-time token quotations (3000+ assets, 80+ markets, key-free). Manipulation-resistant price source for agents. Data by DIA.
useCase: Use to get a real-time, multi-market aggregated USD price for a token by symbol or by blockchain+contract address.

zh-CN.title: DIA 预言机
zh-CN.subtitle: 多源去中心化预言机价格
zh-CN.description: DIA 价格 API（TRON） 通过 x402 gateway 提供公开数据访问，适合 Agent 在金融分析、交易研究、风险筛查和数据聚合流程中调用。
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

endpoints.title: Aggregated price quotation by asset symbol
endpoints.subtitle: /v1/quotation/{symbol}
endpoints.description: Aggregated price quotation by asset symbol
endpoints.useCase: Use this endpoint when an agent needs aggregated price quotation by asset symbol through the dia-price-tron gateway route.

zh-CN.title: Aggregated price quotation by asset symbol
zh-CN.subtitle: /v1/quotation/{symbol}
zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/v1/quotation/{symbol}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.title: Aggregated price quotation by blockchain + contract address
endpoints.subtitle: /v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}
endpoints.description: Aggregated price quotation by blockchain + contract address
endpoints.useCase: Use this endpoint when an agent needs aggregated price quotation by blockchain + contract address through the dia-price-tron gateway route.

zh-CN.title: Aggregated price quotation by blockchain + contract address
zh-CN.subtitle: /v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}
zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/v1/assetQuotation/{blockchain}/{address}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。
